title: rhododendron dasycladoides
intro: Rhododendron dasycladoides, also known as the 'Evergreen Azalea', is a species of flowering plant in the rhododendron family native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rhododendron dasycladoides are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds using a solvent.
